source.section: Part 12 - Datalink & IFF > IFF from AZ/EL Page > Auto IFF (AZ/EL)

steps.action: Power Up IFF (Identify-Friend-or-Foe) and Datalink systems as shown previously in the MANUAL IFF example.
Set AZ/EL Sub-page to IFF RDR.
Select desired IFF scanning azimuth (in deg).
Select desired IFF interrogation range (in nm).
Make sure the L+S INT (Launch & Steering Interrogation) option is unboxed (de-selected).
Select AUTO INT (Automatic Interrogation) option. When selected, it will be boxed.

The IFF system will automatically perform scan interrogations at the selected azimuth centered about boresight every 10 seconds. AUTO IFF TUTORIAL (AZ/EL) CIT FOV (Field-of-View): shows the azimuthal extent of manual and automatic interrogations made by the CIT (combined interrogator/transponder ).
